order.label: PRO 1 Constructive
order.job: Deliver your CONSTRUCTIVE: build your team's full case for the motion — your framework and your strongest contentions with warrants. Do not rebut; there is nothing to rebut yet.

order.label: CON 1 Constructive
order.job: Deliver your CONSTRUCTIVE: build your team's full case against the motion — your framework and your strongest contentions with warrants. Case-building first; direct refutation belongs to your partner's rebuttal.

order.label: PRO 2 Rebuttal
order.job: Deliver your REBUTTAL: attack the other team's constructive line by line — name their contentions and dismantle the warrants. Defend your partner's case where it was pre-empted.

order.label: CON 2 Rebuttal
order.job: Deliver your REBUTTAL: attack the other team's constructive line by line AND answer the attacks just made on your team's case — frontline your partner's contentions, then strike.

order.label: PRO 1 Summary
order.job: Deliver your SUMMARY: collapse the debate to the clash your team is winning. Weigh — explain WHY your winning ground outweighs theirs. No brand-new contentions; extension and weighing only.

order.label: CON 1 Summary
order.job: Deliver your SUMMARY: collapse the debate to the clash your team is winning. Weigh against their summary's framing. No brand-new contentions; extension and weighing only.

order.label: PRO 2 Final Focus
order.job: Deliver your FINAL FOCUS: the single reason your team wins, crystallised. Nothing new — a foul here costs the round. Write the judge's ballot for them.

order.label: CON 2 Final Focus
order.job: Deliver your FINAL FOCUS: the single reason your team wins, crystallised. Nothing new — a foul here costs the round. Write the judge's ballot for them.
